name: Tynaarlo (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the hoist band and the central fly band

description: A red band at the hoist charged with a white heraldic flower, the fly divided into three horizontal bands of green, red and yellow.
history: Flag of the municipality of Tynaarlo in the north of the province of Drenthe, formed in the 1998 reorganisation of the province's municipalities.

features.role: a red band at the hoist
a white heraldic flower on the hoist band
